# Release Notes Template

## Version
`vX.Y.Z`

## Release Date
`YYYY-MM-DD`

## Summary
One short paragraph describing the release in plain language.

## What's New
- Bullet 1
- Bullet 2
- Bullet 3

## Changed
- Bullet 1
- Bullet 2

## Fixed
- Bullet 1
- Bullet 2

## Notes
- Any rollout caveats, migration notes, or platform-specific behavior.
